title: GAP-D: Update URI strings in all markdown docs
description: Why: After the parse change (GAP-A), all documentation still shows the old secretx://backend/path format. Callers reading the docs will write code that fails.\n\nWhat: Find and replace all secretx:// URI examples in ~19 .md files (SPEC.md, README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, per-backend README.md files, etc.). Transformation: s|secretx://([^/]+)/|secretx:\1:|. For absolute paths: secretx://file//etc/key → secretx:file:/etc/key.
